entries.gt_65acd9cda4b8ef: M - map. Find the nearest hermodoor and memorize the route with your feet, not only your eyes.
entries.gt_6600ac1b384254: Mancobus is not scary. The scary one is the person who went at him without a second magazine.
entries.gt_66dfca1e889034: The formalin ran out in the morning. By lunch two jars had begun behaving more actively than the lab assistants.
entries.gt_6ef6cba2259477: Q - quest log, N - NET SPHERE. Listen to rumors, but check water, food, and coupons with your hands.
entries.gt_7083655eeb7104: Did you come to me on Olga Dmitrievna's recommendation? She is a good colleague, so I will grant clearance. I need a field assistant: the cult of Chernobog coincides with samosbor too often. Take the clot, learn to use it, and bring me the idol of Chernobog intact.
entries.gt_7193e14372596f: Patrol goes in pairs. One watches the ground, the other watches the dark. Amateur initiative gets buried separately.
entries.gt_74ca45ba5920ef: Experimental data on samosbor is dirty but useful. If a sample reacts to light, pulse, and siren, that is already a model.
entries.gt_7813ebdd957a47: It has gone quieter. Now the radiator whispers one word at a time, not in chorus.
entries.gt_78a770113bcfc5: If the wall is warm, do not warm your hands. Step away and check whether there is a meat shutter behind it.
entries.gt_79464385602290: The threshold is crossed, and the mysterious voice already knows you went too far. Take the voice in the jar from Jean's cell and return it to him; do not open the lid.
entries.gt_79a0293df157e1: Put the idol under the Father's candle. He will return the item and holy water; Yakov's debt will remain.
entries.gt_7a72df30ac0a7b: Ammo on the floor is never just lying there. Someone failed to carry it.
entries.gt_7b382e1708c1f3: Do not look into the green source longer than three breaths. After that the map gets worse and so does your aim.
entries.gt_7b7208c85050ba: The threshold is open. Write it down: open does not mean saved.
entries.gt_7bde2d46cbf315: I am not Vanka. Ivan Zakharov was in the log until topology ate the log. I failed the basic program, but now the door proves itself.
entries.gt_7ce2f38e0edbab: Yakov sent you? Accepted. So he is done with the jars and sent you where a field person can be useful. The lower you go, the closer to samosbor, and the fewer pretty versions there are. Clear the sector, remove the beasts, do not crawl alone after a report. Come back alive and you get the paper on Shadows and rounds.
entries.gt_848d045c98d610: After samosbor the blue sample became one gram lighter. In the model that is bad; in the protocol, urgent.
entries.gt_8578df594da9dc: Alive? Report briefly. We will discuss the wet filter later.
entries.gt_860c6ea79bdf75: Do not unseal it in the lift, colleague. The lift gives us too many uncontrolled variables.
entries.gt_866dae36794c5f: E - talk, open a door, check a cabinet. First look who is nearby, then reach out.
entries.gt_86930f8c0e7fb0: The target stands. The beast runs. Learn to hit before the corridor.
entries.gt_87e2a23c2db33d: The light in the corner went out. Do not snuff the candle: Marfa is two wet turns and a door without a handle away.
entries.gt_8d6f51d9571ae6: Yakov sent you? Called me Ivan Zakharov? Then he is still angry about topology. Listen fast: Petlya was a resident, then the shadow went ahead of him. Shadows walk near samosbor; Vanka saw it. Kill Petlya in a wide corridor, keep the light, step back after the lunge, and carry the cold clot to Yakov sealed. Do not touch the lid.
entries.gt_8e181f9e19fb5d: Petlya is gone, but the nail remains. See it? No? Good.
entries.gt_8e9f2f6454d84a: Do not sweep your own people with the barrel. They teach that quickly here.
entries.gt_8f76552994668d: Show your hands. Both. Clean hands are rare here, but dirty wounds are worse.
entries.gt_9077576f7ed026: Sergeant Barinov. The counter is mine, the sector is everyone's. Took a gun - count the rounds.
entries.gt_91e288adaa85c0: Olga Dmitrievna gives the introduction: talk to Sergeant Barinov in the armory. He will issue a Makarov and 8 rounds to the floor's new resident.
entries.gt_9467d5d891c82e: Identify your own before firing. After firing is too late.
entries.gt_95f044fe181682: Do not drink the water coupon. Coupons are shown, water is saved, mugs are not lost.
entries.gt_963cbbe00dc3ac: If a door repeats, do not celebrate the shortcut. Check the mark, the water, and the other side.
entries.gt_9817bf79972ef6: The chest stretched out after the test. Yakov said: model deformation. But I heard the matches inside clicking through the cells.
entries.gt_9b1dd8af20b0d1: I study the nature of samosbor. In the laboratory I need a lab assistant, and in the corridor - someone who can deliver a sample intact.
entries.gt_a0ae1cef455698: On the lower floor, another order is already speaking to you. Find Marfa Porogovaya {dir}: she knows how to pass to the Heralds.
entries.gt_a0cb72958b273c: Fear is normal. Just keep moving.
entries.gt_a17cee6a40be61: Fear is normal. Stupidity is not. Listen to fear; leave stupidity upstairs.
entries.gt_a31cdf32dd4482: Carry it to Yakov. He knows how to handle jars like this: number, seal, logbook, and never show it to anyone in the kitchen.
entries.gt_a3c91c42bd1f4a: There are people behind that pipe. That is why we stand here, not somewhere drier.
entries.gt_a718647181d6c6: The logbook came back without me. So the paper got through, and I got stuck between the green wall and the lift.
entries.gt_a7e39b6e53da4a: The cult does not pray loudly here: guard, bucket, list, candle, and a debt on wet paper.
entries.gt_a9bb00152af896: Guard the phase clot. The third Herald sits behind the wall; water does not reach him.
entries.gt_aa76a186d68dd4: A round runs out sooner than a newcomer thinks.
entries.gt_ab6c35a8e549ab: Gromny sends you lower, to the meat floor, where people know more about the forbidden and return less often. Check the lift at the threshold; if wounded, back.
entries.gt_ac43eaa6cea2b2: In the experiment log, someone wrote your surname in pencil. Erase it after the conversation, but not with a bare hand.
entries.gt_af32c7ae2285bf: Major Gromny. The collectors' outpost holds the pipe between water, beast, and the people behind the door.
entries.gt_af81abd94e34da: Matches are not bones. Matches remember where the corner was before the rearrangement. Just do not count out loud.
entries.gt_aff6c06f126a38: Do not look for the black idol in the temple. It is in the storeroom, under a wet rag, where jars sweat without heat.
entries.gt_b1370f95790bf3: Bring Yakov the idol of Chernobog. He is testing the connection between samosbors and cults; this is the first field trip for a real sample.
entries.gt_b178047a6c62e4: Before a sortie, count: magazine, water, bandage, door back.
entries.gt_b341be9070cd2b: A PSI clot is a tool. It produces a result, spends PSI, and leaves recoil; it is not a trick or a prayer.
entries.gt_b3640f1d1ee818: Clot after Petlya goes in a jar. Do not touch the lid. It counted names while Vanka slept.
entries.gt_b3e4633f267287: Vanka did not lie. Vanka only saw: Petlya's shadow was not behind him, but in front. Stand toward the light.
entries.gt_b449107bb8fe5d: A zip gun shoots crooked. It works close, wastes noise far away.
entries.gt_b4c3c6841242e2: Count it out loud: three Heralds, two candles, one door. Do not argue.
entries.gt_b65df8bd03fe6f: The barrel shakes - hold it with both hands. Your hands shake - hold it anyway.
entries.gt_b6f220282a5732: Tired? Sit, eat, steady your breathing. Then go to the lift.
entries.gt_b7d36d5cd3b1c7: Went to Olga? Then you have rations. Do not spend them running in circles.
entries.gt_b99b8925e9a7c5: The spike is not a weapon. It is a dangerous return sample; keep it away from food and documents.
entries.gt_bab8322aec7a83: Nikanor is still breathing? Then listen and do not argue. Three Heralds hold the local seal: two walk, the third is written in behind the wall. Kill all three and the threshold will collapse.
entries.gt_bcecabf0e1af93: The cults of Chernobog appear too often near samosbor traces. I do not believe in cults, but I believe in coincidences that repeat.
entries.gt_bcf975bd294dfe: Come if you are wounded. Just wipe your blood off the floor after yourself; I am alone on shift.
entries.gt_bebf0b9d8694a0: Do not trust the voice from the door. If it promises an exit, it is already holding the handle.
entries.gt_bef5215c4d1ddf: A fake bait has been made for the idol of Chernobog; the true idol remained for Yakov.
entries.gt_bf4d4fbf5c0255: Protocol four-B: after contact, iodine, pulse, record. Do not lick the paper after reading.
entries.gt_c04ef731cfd019: If you brought a report, speak. If you brought fear, set it beside you; everyone here has some.
entries.gt_c121cd1e00c4af: The siren means SAMOSBOR. You go to the nearest hermodoor, close it, and sit quietly.
entries.gt_c177ac96e6f21c: I do not believe in Chernobog. I believe in experiment logs, control groups, and dry lids.
entries.gt_c34b8141e3a66b: If a sample asks in your mother's voice to open the jar, do not open the jar. Let mother in only after inspection too.
entries.gt_c63364470c9408: The Creator does not talk. He crushes with distance and route errors; keep the stabilizer on you.
entries.gt_cb3232f039b6ce: A cultist with a bag of bread is not always kind. First the bread, then the question, then your surname in the corner.
entries.gt_d0753e0d74c91b: You crossed the threshold. Good. Bad news: the voice in the jar does not lead out. It repeats the route in someone else's voice, and the extra step closes the door behind you.
entries.gt_d1c3ff28ae63a6: Do not let Yakov measure you without reason. Later you will itch and swear at me.
entries.gt_d3cbb6cf24ddd8: Sample number seventeen moves only in front of management. For the report we write: reaction to administrative noise.
entries.gt_d553e6d6888085: A Herald is not an angel and not a boss. It guards the seal while the meat pretends there is no passage.
entries.gt_d6a6e8414d3934: I - bag. Bread, water, bandage should be with you. Eat on time.
entries.gt_d7beea76007169: Bring the idol of Chernobog to Vera by the window. She will return the idol with a counterfoil; without a mark it is evidence.
entries.gt_d7c0cb91e60b67: Saw green light - do not stare. Our eyes have no exchange fund.
entries.gt_d8230d0858d874: Show the idol to Streltsov. The Liquidators will return the item with a badge and rounds; your face will go on the list.
entries.gt_d91567b47350d0: Huh?! Quiet. Not you. Probably not you. The jar clinked by itself.
entries.gt_6c80e01b7ab86c: I am junior scientific staff. That means I open first what the seniors later describe.
entries.gt_6ce421bcf8f3b9: Keep the green sample away from cloth. After contact, the lab coat goes straight into a bag, not onto a chair.
entries.gt_6ee89e6cc44472: A dry filter is one price; a filter without questions is another entirely.
entries.gt_7388f5140bfd09: I am quiet because loud ones here are quickly put to holding the door.
entries.gt_761ff64284c899: The certificate is wet. Wet certificates are accepted only from the drowned and from management.
entries.gt_784e662e37aa22: A concentrate coupon is not food. It is a promise of food with a greasy stamp.
entries.gt_79af6e83bc3f25: On the way back, do not argue over loot. You will not carry loot if you fail to carry yourself.
entries.gt_7d7d352243ffb4: Do not whisper into the window: the window records louder than I do.
entries.gt_8555a20d291515: Cruelty without a stamp is called arbitrariness. With a stamp, procedure.
entries.gt_85aeedc78e1fce: Goods exist. A fair price does not; samosbor carried it off.
entries.gt_8972010eb411ae: Buy the stamp separately. Conscience is not included.
entries.gt_8af6051fc8636a: The young do not know that the yard used to need no approval from the building committee.
entries.gt_8bdebba89c28d4: I do not hang the old photograph: the collective starts remembering different things and arguing.
entries.gt_8e7799d679a97b: The logbook is with me, but the surnames in it often swap places.
entries.gt_9024ff2d6d56d4: After the siren, everyone prays. Not everyone knows to whom.
entries.gt_912cbb0d560fc3: The instrument technician said the needle is intact; it just goes into the red zone with the power disconnected.
entries.gt_917ab7629a7f5d: You can turn in anything: water, a sample, paper, someone else's problem. The price differs.
entries.gt_92ddfa981733ac: Noise is duller by the wall. That is why beasts and people with knives often sit there.
entries.gt_938d0071c8e02b: I stood by the radiator sober for an hour. Now I know: the radiator lies every other time.
entries.gt_94344be90a5d0d: Do not sell the transparent sample in front of us. We have to answer for it later in dry words.
entries.gt_95c6c7cbdbe5bd: On one floor I saw a sign saying "exit". The old man nearby said that used to be written on honest doors.
entries.gt_9711e837dce4d1: A chalk mark without a date is someone else's trap or someone else's grave.
entries.gt_977508b597d2ae: The stamp-eater ate the attachment to the application. That means the attachment was convincing.
entries.gt_9945d2ca43b66d: I would let you through without paper, but later they will not let me through without paper.
entries.gt_9a30adc0e1f00b: I do not drink. I disinfect what they give instead of water.
entries.gt_9d452a87ab1a4e: After the all-clear, complaints are not accepted. After the all-clear, only explanations of why you are not in shelter are accepted.
entries.gt_9f2fe6a711df95: Only the dead go without queue. And management, but that is almost the same window.
entries.gt_a00ac1f7834aff: If an old woman asks you to look for a photo by the lift, clarify: a photo of whom, whose lift, and whether she herself returned.
entries.gt_a0b01c6209592c: I sell a route without heroism: there, back, and where to drink.
entries.gt_a11fac072459c9: The commission comes tomorrow. That means today all cabinets must look innocent.
entries.gt_a2b5ec1b34879b: The logbook got wet from inside. Paper is the weak point in this project.
entries.gt_a44a3c7f1d86f2: I am a lab assistant, not Yakov. I just want to close my shift without a mutation in the remarks field.
entries.gt_a663f99f77a10d: I write down everything I see. Then I reconcile the log: time, pulse, who stood too close.
entries.gt_a8d62e56734037: Do not unseal is not advice. It is a protocol clause written after someone else's mistake.
entries.gt_aa7e215b35c236: Do not approach sharply. Around here, sharp ones are either robbing or already afraid.
entries.gt_ac4545465d98ab: I am responsible for the cabinet. If the seal is broken, I will not be the only one answering.
entries.gt_ad9f8406658764: A debt in the notebook takes less room than a debtor in the corridor.
entries.gt_afb00a97b0470c: I saw a queue occupy a door. Third was an auntie with a milk can; the door stayed silent.
entries.gt_b08286850cdfd3: A pass without a counterfoil costs less, but costs more when it is read.
entries.gt_b240bb81bb3228: The coupon goes wrong, the wound goes here. The queue now decides what matters more.
entries.gt_b327468e8425ac: Today three were sitting by the radiator. The fourth held a place with a milk can and did not return.
entries.gt_b4b19ffbc87cb4: If a signature without a hand appears in the logbook, I close the shift and call the lab head.
entries.gt_ba91161c9ea374: No need to bow. Better check whether the hermodoor is closed.
entries.gt_bade937ca8e905: The queue sorts by itself: those without coupons leave, those with debt stay, those with a stamp pay.
entries.gt_bb1e7d5d962170: The teacher said to keep my hands busy. I am holding bread.
entries.gt_bc67aef8d84d13: There is a forged sheet. Do not show it under the lamp or to a clerk who has not eaten.
entries.gt_bc731c0045178d: Without a record, I did not see it. With a record, I still may not see it.
entries.gt_be43ff1e6258d5: I can make a second copy. Keep the first dry, otherwise neither will be accepted.
entries.gt_bf2cffcce993f5: The orderly said not to cough on the logbook. Later they will take the stains for a diagnosis.
entries.gt_c0d4ada5d9d880: Put the date before the signature. If the signature comes first, the date is corrected in red later.
entries.gt_c2f66d86904dc3: The professor asks for a sample set, the lab head asks for silence, the commission asks for someone guilty.
entries.gt_c304d72e0b3f05: I saw a person step out of the queue and go wild in one dry day.
entries.gt_c85188a390be1f: I have an old key in my desk. Not to the office. To the confidence that doors used to lead somewhere.
entries.gt_c91ecd658fbe23: The form is filled out in blue ink. Black ink here is for obituaries and corrections.
entries.gt_cbd8dfac38f586: Container intact, seal intact, lab assistant debatable. The commission likes that.
entries.gt_cee9ae30cbbbd7: If your door has disappeared, bring a report from the building committee or two witnesses.
entries.gt_cfb56b71b61a95: If you want the truth, wait until they start lying in the smoking room for the second round.
entries.gt_cfff0d217aea70: The signature is illegible. Rewrite in block letters before the window closes.
entries.gt_d0431fa720349f: I do not look through the peephole. Sometimes it shows what is not there yet too early.
entries.gt_d57cd7b384b284: Smoke has a price: a pack, bread, or silence.
entries.gt_68c32b3d1a5674: An empty train does not mean a safe train. Check the cab and second car first.
entries.gt_694f529bf3c207: Scrap from a door: do not dry bandages over the stove. Last batch went to the medpost smelling of soup.
entries.gt_69624590cf4bf1: NII marking: if the unperson detector is silent, check batteries; if it beeps, call the shift senior.
entries.gt_6b7ef6ff3a80ce: Do not touch the bag by the radiator: the owner is alive, but after rounds is no longer listed in the section. If you take the ration, he will come for it without documents.
entries.gt_6c784bf832458e: Market rumor: better sell a false pass before inspection. After inspection they sell the owner.
entries.gt_6dac9f46f07fd3: The tag from the key led to the safe better than the key did. Search for the key by number; put the tag in the cash desk.
entries.gt_6ef2ded1f47987: One meter by one meter jumped without authorization. Seal the cell with chalk, file the detour after return.
entries.gt_6f289d95889295: Copy of the Chernobog case: central cell unconfirmed, outer cells active.
entries.gt_6f7291cf6aefb2: Anyone carrying two certificates is checked by the stamp-eater. The third certificate must not be hidden.
entries.gt_7040f1a2d3c59f: Clinic record: the worker needs entry through the service passage before the raid. If security asks, it is a cough, not an escape.
entries.gt_71e6646876d51a: Do not read the shelter list out loud. Check surnames by finger, no roll call at the door.
entries.gt_72a14bffedc3db: On a platform without people, stand by the wall. The platform edge crumbles and is hard to see in fog.
entries.gt_735452458581fb: Borshchemancer's memo: listen to the pot until it boils; after boiling, let no one near the pot without a bucket.
entries.gt_7564bddbe042b1: Check the pressure circuit with a gauge before welding. After welding, the error goes into the report, not into repair.
entries.gt_75dfff298b5cf4: The forged pass worked at the checkpoint, but the card archive opened a case on a fictitious resident. Exit requires a real counterfoil or a witness from the section.
entries.gt_772e4536919fbf: The radio catches someone else's shift on the neighboring frequency. Write down the frequency; do not wake the radio operator.
entries.gt_789b768c37e17a: A fake certificate works until the first cough. The second cough is already protocol.
entries.gt_7a72ef2fb7af24: The archive accepts only papers with losses, dates, and a shift signature. Submit new papers through the window.
entries.gt_7bcc05ff3ec1f1: If the lift brings the smell of someone else's kitchen, do not press the same floor twice. Write down the number, check the diagram, and exit where there is a post or living light.
entries.gt_7c46bfa24dd362: Workshop memo: the sledgehammer is too honest for this building. Use it where protocol has already broken.
entries.gt_7c4cb463889ca2: The radio-chess schedule arrived later than the move. Whoever stood in the cell by the lift stays there until reconciliation.
entries.gt_7d927c979cc496: Ira, draft: you may look at the price tag; you may touch only your conscience. The rest is paid to security.
entries.gt_7ec9be6f397c49: Door commission protocol: locked sections are not considered lost if access is temporarily not under consideration.
entries.gt_7f03bd31a0cc5e: The stamp-eater senses two copies. Keep the third copy in an iron folder.
entries.gt_7f72ee368cd871: Foam-concrete sheet N4: foam set loosely, water went underneath, passage to be considered temporarily dangerous.
entries.gt_80300c15803edd: Supply order: issue black concentrate to Liquidators. Explain the benefit of white ration to residents.
entries.gt_80d7abf0c5c269: If the signature field is empty, do not fill it with your own name. The senior archivist's signature is required.
entries.gt_82793f833cbe8c: Post-Istotit memo: put water under the bench, keep hands off the handle, enter the dispute about glowing in the log.
entries.gt_82cb0a3e669cc4: The children's map leads to the small shelter room. Admit adults only by the senior shift's list.
entries.gt_82d86de7da7f58: Burn-through report: the door opened like a window. Close the window, search for the door in the next room.
entries.gt_835c6f6d7fe5db: Buyer's estimate: a harpoon is needed in flooded passages. A dry harpoon pays less.
entries.gt_886f5b93a6a90b: The spring fell into the ventilation. An hour later it was found with dust and someone else's shift number.
entries.gt_89cc7e9a82bc1a: Ration optimization report: replace one bottle of water with two coupons. A coupon requires no filtering.
entries.gt_8b4f4280daa024: There is a pass for a lost child in the card archive. Do not issue it without a guardian's signature and do not allow them into the lift.
entries.gt_8e8f2580b69a8d: Debt note: porridge is returned as porridge, water as water, a black mark as a conversation without witnesses.
entries.gt_8ecef6f9163057: Draft notice: a welded door is not a refusal of aid. Aid is located on the other side of procedure.
entries.gt_90aad64dd3d1ac: Quiet Room 69: adults inside decide for themselves whom to open to. Debt, raid, and official do not grant entry rights.
entries.gt_90d8b0daa25cea: Check the corner with an inspection mirror before stepping. Take the second step only after checking the floor.
entries.gt_90d967a9bd47e3: Asbestos cord is warm after cold samosbor. Do not handle with bare hands or with kin.
entries.gt_934285b33e6041: Protocol 3/PSI: stabilizer did not help the patient. Tremor remains; recheck dose and logbook.
entries.gt_94a90530d00e6d: Infected map scrap: Collectors, two floors down; note "smog or cell-jump, do not unseal sample".
entries.gt_95bd31799a36b5: The contour is recognized as temporarily flat. Until stabilization, walk along the wall and do not cut corners.
entries.gt_97d8ec723f26f4: Do not read a case without a cover out loud: afterward the archive looks for the voice, not the paper. Check the surname against the resident card and close the cabinet with a witness present.
entries.gt_98396c68b8f9ce: NII warning: if the lift after Collectors smells of iodine, you may get out; return on the first button.
entries.gt_9873eef114e226: Form 12-K: addressee - empty place by the third cabinet. Deliver the reply before the addressee appears.
entries.gt_998bde1508d6cb: GPVM report: yesterday detained at the third window. Issue after time reconciliation, but not earlier than yesterday.
entries.gt_9ccf95aeefd334: Note in Betonov's margins: if the lower sample smells of iodine before unsealing, do not unseal; if after, it is too late to argue.
entries.gt_9ce7c8dc0892d5: The night archive issues counterfoils through the tray. Leave your name at the door; do not demand change.
entries.gt_9d43c3af94856b: The stamp of order went off with a pop. File glass shards with the report, treat fingers with alcohol.
entries.gt_9dadc8169d1a41: Neighbor list: who needs water, who can be offered meaning. Do not show black palms to children.
entries.gt_9fe5a2c01e62f3: A void warrant does not open a door. The post needs it so it does not count the door on the diagram.
entries.gt_a032ef1234f606: Rounds sheet: antifungal ointment does not help against fungus in documents. Burn documents, keep hands.
entries.gt_a11a1abd137088: A shortcut loop is not a route reduction without a detour form and the lift's signature.
entries.gt_a305ba47704301: Cabinet instruction: buy samples without witnesses, register sellers as voluntary participants in recalculation.
entries.gt_a4194e981b3e94: If a numbered lift is silent, listen not to the door but to the shaft above it. Grinding overhead means the cab is counting cargo; move to the wall and do not hold the button.
entries.gt_a82b2a619f368c: Candle slip: do not blow out the candle before roll call. The light is not holy, but in the dark surnames change places.
entries.gt_a82fa46349692d: A certificate that the applicant is not an attachment is accepted only with the applicant attached.
entries.gt_a82fc48270d94b: Report L-33: slime was counted until the third bucket, then the shift counter ordered only full buckets taken.
entries.gt_ab98237a9d2063: Do not heat sealing wax over a candle. It runs into the case number and spoils the signature.
entries.gt_ac3a04a9625f28: Paragraph L-47: distance to an open chest must be at least two steps and one shield.
entries.gt_aee5ca3b9b7bc3: A valve tag without an extract is considered a rumor. Close the valve with key N3 and a fitter's signature.
entries.gt_b098dab7dd9c8a: Unsigned note: bread for passage, water for silence, knife only if you lied first.
entries.gt_b115f5bca570fa: The children's map has been updated in chalk. The red arrow leads to shelter, the blue to the place where adults block the passage.
entries.gt_b4c412c62d217e: A denunciation against a neighbor returned with resolution: neighbor does not exist. Seal the apartment until the neighbor appears.
entries.gt_b78ef4866a6553: Lift diagrams often lie, but show where to look for the button and emergency path. A warrant does not make the route safe, but the post lets you pass without a fight.
entries.gt_b7d090f76ca810: Loss certificate: norm exceeded only emotionally. Review numeric alarm threshold.
entries.gt_b87b232b64ea7d: Replace the seal as a whole: the senior shift accepts only full tape and a dry report. Pieces repair the report, and later the door leaks during siren.
entries.gt_b8854115e790ab: A hermodoor is held not by a stamp but by rubber around the whole contour. Ink can close a report, but not a gap; the senior accepts only dry sealant.
entries.gt_b89636867dd766: Issue the shadow pike only for raids. After the raid, check the tip and the armorer's signature.
entries.gt_b9601cb086f409: Rounds report: a furnished room was found empty; furniture sealed until owner or commission returns.
entries.gt_b9f3e9e2d73964: GPVM reports: above is above today. Complaints to the contrary accepted after contour stabilization.
entries.gt_ba97fa7a9fa236: Time reconciliation showed a shortage of two minutes. Search for the minutes in the smoking room; do not wake witnesses.
entries.gt_bd150be8bb344d: With mirror wiring, keep the permanent pass face away from the plane. Do not hand documents to the reflection.
entries.gt_bd68b8c858bdcd: Vera accepts ballots but looks at the stamp. Without a stamp, a vote is considered noise.
entries.gt_beb2adff70622f: Sima Clinic: issue antibiotic without profession in the field. Fever does not ask what a person works as at night.
entries.gt_beca8b6173dbe7: Caravan bill: the route contains the word back seven times. The eighth back is paid separately.
entries.gt_bedff7df728d80: A sheet of metal covered the hole for the night, but a wet crack ran along the weld. Issue sealant to the shift and do not let people with buckets under the seam.
entries.gt_c0fbec44b7b0ad: OBZh classroom memo: if a familiar voice calls from the peephole, write the answer in the log; do not answer out loud.
entries.gt_c27b274d377fa0: Keep the door kit with the teacher. Do not touch without an adult. If there is no adult, appoint the calmest one.
entries.gt_c293dd8a66cee8: The ballot was filled out before the election because window N7 hurried signatures before lunch. After the complaint, the box was closed and the election was adjusted to the prepared sheets.
